name: Improved Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Vegetable Oil (lard or Crisco would be better)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F and grease the pans or skillet.
2. Mix the dry ingredients in a large bowl: baking powder, baking soda, salt, flour, and cornmeal.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, honey, vegetable oil, and buttermilk.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into greased pans or a skillet, filling them about halfway.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Serve warm.
